findings.description: `BusinessDateProvider` appears explicitly as the declared variable type in the s5 Java code example (`BusinessDateProvider provider = SystemRepository.get("businessDateProvider");`), but is not listed in s5 hints. A user asking how to update the business date using BusinessDateProvider would not find s5.

The RST anchors `date-system_time_change` and `date-business_date_change` are defined directly above the 拡張例 subsections in the source (e.g., `.. _date-system_time_change:`), making s6 the actual destination content for those anchors. They are listed in s1 hints (which only references them) but omitted from s6 hints where the substantive content lives.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `.. _date-system_time_change:` and `.. _date-business_date_change:` anchors are defined at the start of the 拡張例 subsections.
